Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Benjamin Ikuta, Esq., Low McKinley Baleria Weber & Salenko, LLP., 916-231-2400, for defendant and moving party: Catholic Healthcare West and St. Joseph's Medical Center
David B. Baum, Esq., Law Offices of Baum & Blake, 415-956-5544, for for Plaintiff and opposing party: Donna Aflague
Alicia Kennon, Esq., Andrada & associates, 510-287-4160, appearing by telephone, for Defendant and opposing party: Dr. John Mardiat

Argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST AND ST. JOSEPH'S MEDICAL CENTER'S Motion To Change Venue is denied. Sustain defendants objections to evidence, no. 1 & 2. Order signed in open court (one order for both motions). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR #7489
